signals.why: A signed $900M DOE task order plus S&P SmallCap 600 inclusion cement Centrus as the only US-technology HALEU enrichment route for next-gen reactors — an absolute Western supply chokepoint.
signals.evidence: Set to join the S&P SmallCap 600 effective July 14, a week after signing the $900M DOE HALEU contract (final 900 kg of demo HALEU completed two weeks early); short interest 23.3% of float.

signals.trend: Index-flow mechanics: SpaceX fast-tracked into the Nasdaq-100
signals.why: SpaceX entering the Nasdaq-100 on its 15th trading day under new fast-track rules forces ~$4.3B of passive buying and sets precedent — index-flow mechanics now matter for every future mega-IPO.
signals.evidence: Joined the Nasdaq-100 effective July 7 as the first stock added under fast-track entry rules; J.P. Morgan estimated ~$4.3 billion of passive buying into SPCX.

signals.trend: Embodied-AI micro-cap wins cross-domain AFRL award
signals.why: A $4.2M AFRL 'HANGTIME' award extending SwarmOS from drones to satellites is small in dollars but strategically re-rates a sub-$350M former Sarcos shell as cross-domain autonomy software.
signals.evidence: Palladyne AI executes $4.2 million U.S. Air Force contract to advance swarming capabilities — the HANGTIME project extends its technology from the ground to orbit.
